debug_info.goal:
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
D : @DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
B : (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) → N ∈ D → Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)
hB : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), N = sSup (B N hN)
hB' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), sSupIndep (B N hN)
hB'' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), ⊥ ∉ B N hN
H : ∃ N, ∃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN ≠ {N}
⊢ D < @DirectSumDecomposition.refinement C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M D B hB hB' hB''

failed_attempts:
by
  apply lt_of_le_of_ne (refinement_le B hB hB' hB'')
  intro heq
  obtain ⟨N, hN, hBN⟩ := H
  apply hBN
  -- We show B N hN = {N} to derive a contradiction
  -- First, show B N hN is nonempty (otherwise N = sSup ∅ = ⊥ ∈ D, contradiction)
  have hBne : (B N hN).Nonempty := by
    rw [Set.nonempty_iff_ne_empty]
    intro h
    have : N = ⊥ := by rw [hB N hN, h, sSup_empty]
    exact D.not_bot_mem (this ▸ hN)
  -- Every element of B N hN must equal N
  ext b
  simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff]
  constructor
  · intro hb
    by_contra hne
    have hb_mem : b ∈ (refinement B hB hB' hB'' : DirectSumDecomposition M) := by
      simp only [refinement]
      exact Set.mem_iUnion₂.mpr ⟨N, hN, hb⟩
    have hb_in_D : b ∈ (D : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)) := heq ▸ hb_mem
    have hb_le_N : b ≤ N := by
      rw [hB N hN]
      exact le_sSup hb
    have hb_ne_bot : b ≠ ⊥ := fun h => hB'' N hN (h ▸ hb)
    have hN_in_diff : N ∈ (D : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)) \ {b} :=
      Set.mem_diff_of_mem hN (Ne.symm hne)
    have hb_le_sup : b ≤ sSup ((D : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)) \ {b}) :=
      hb_le_N.trans (le_sSup hN_in_diff)
    exact hb_ne_bot ((D.sSupIndep hb_in_D).eq_bot_of_le hb_le_sup)
  · intro h
    rw [h]
    obtain ⟨b, hb⟩ := hBne
    suffices b = N by rwa [this] at hb
    by_contra hne
    have hb_mem : b ∈ (refinement B hB hB' hB'' : DirectSumDecomposition M) :=
      Set.mem_iUnion₂.mpr ⟨N, hN, hb⟩
    have hb_in_D : b ∈ (D : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)) := heq ▸ hb_mem
    have hb_le_N : b ≤ N := (hB N hN).symm ▸ le_sSup hb
    have hb_ne_bot : b ≠ ⊥ := fun h => hB'' N hN (h ▸ hb)
    have hN_in_diff : N ∈ (D : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)) \ {b} :=
      Set.mem_diff_of_mem hN (Ne.symm hne)
    have hb_le_sup : b ≤ sSup ((D : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)) \ {b}) :=
      hb_le_N.trans (le_sSup hN_in_diff)
    exact hb_ne_bot ((D.sSupIndep hb_in_D).eq_bot_of_le hb_le_sup)
